question: cot θ – tan θ = 2 সমীকরণটির সাধারণ সমাধান কোনটি?
explanation: cot⁡θ−tan⁡θ=2⇒cos⁡θsin⁡θ−sin⁡θcos⁡θ=2⇒cos⁡2θ−sin⁡2θsin⁡θcos⁡θ=2⇒cos⁡2θ=2sin⁡θcos⁡θ⇒cos⁡2θ=sin⁡2θ⇒tan⁡2θ=1=tan⁡π4∴2θ=nπ+π4,n∈Z.⇒θ=(4n+1)π8 \begin{array}{l} \text { } \cot \theta-\tan \theta=2 \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\cos \theta}{\sin \theta}-\frac{\sin \theta}{\cos \theta}=2 \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\cos ^{2} \theta-\sin ^{2} \theta}{\sin \theta \cos \theta}=2 \\ \Rightarrow \cos 2 \theta=2 \sin \theta \cos \theta \\ \Rightarrow \cos 2 \theta=\sin 2 \theta \Rightarrow \tan 2 \theta=1=\tan \frac{\pi}{4} \\ \therefore 2 \theta=n \pi+\frac{\pi}{4}, n \in \mathbb{Z} . \\ \Rightarrow \theta=(4 n+1) \frac{\pi}{8} \end{array} cotθ−tanθ=2⇒sinθcosθ−cosθsinθ=2⇒sinθcosθcos2θ−sin2θ=2⇒cos2θ=2sinθcosθ⇒cos2θ=sin2θ⇒tan2θ=1=tan4π∴2θ=nπ+4π,n∈Z.⇒θ=(4n+1)8π ∴ \therefore \quad ∴ নির্ণেয় সমাধান, θ=(4n+1)π8 \theta=(4 n+1) \frac{\pi}{8} θ=(4n+1)8π
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $cot⁡\\theta −tan⁡\\theta =2⇒cos⁡\\theta sin⁡\\theta −sin⁡\\theta cos⁡\\theta =2⇒cos⁡2\\theta −sin⁡2\\theta sin⁡\\theta cos⁡\\theta =2⇒cos⁡2\\theta =2sin⁡\\theta cos⁡\\theta ⇒cos⁡2\\theta =sin⁡2\\theta ⇒tan⁡2\\theta =1=tan⁡\\pi 4∴2\\theta =n\\pi +\\pi 4,n∈Z.⇒\\theta =(4n+1)\\pi 8 \begin{array}{l} \text { } \cot \theta-\tan \theta=2 \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\cos \theta}{\sin \theta}-\frac{\sin \theta}{\cos \theta}=2 \\ \Rightarrow \frac{\cos ^{2} \theta-\sin ^{2} \theta}{\sin \theta \cos \theta}=2 \\ \Rightarrow \cos 2 \theta=2 \sin \theta \cos \theta \\ \Rightarrow \cos 2 \theta=\sin 2 \theta \Rightarrow \tan 2 \theta=1=\tan \frac{\pi}{4} \\ \therefore 2 \theta=n \pi+\frac{\pi}{4}, n \in \mathbb{Z} . \\ \Rightarrow \theta=(4 n+1) \frac{\pi}{8} \end{array} cot\\theta −tan\\theta =2⇒sin\\theta cos\\theta −cos\\theta sin\\theta =2⇒sin\\theta cos\\theta cos2\\theta −sin2\\theta =2⇒cos2\\theta =2sin\\theta cos\\theta ⇒cos2\\theta =sin2\\theta ⇒tan2\\theta =1=tan4\\pi ∴2\\theta =n\\pi +4\\pi ,n∈Z.⇒\\theta =(4n+1)8\\pi  ∴ \therefore \quad ∴ নির্ণেয় সমাধান, \\theta =(4n+1)\\pi 8 \theta=(4 n+1) \frac{\pi}{8} \\theta =(4n+1)8\\pi $

question: sin⁡−1(2a1+a2) \sin^{- 1}{\left ( \frac{2 a}{1 + a^{2}} \right )} sin−1(1+a22a) - cos⁡−1(1−b21+b2) \cos^{- 1}{\left ( \frac{1 - b^{2}}{1 + b^{2}} \right )} cos−1(1+b21−b2) =2tan-1(x) হলে, x এর মান-
explanation: sin⁡−12a1+a2−cos⁡−11−b21+b2=2tan⁡−1x⇒2tan⁡−1a−2tan⁡−1b=2tan⁡−1x⇒tan⁡−1x=tan⁡−1a−b1+ab⇒x=a−b1+ab \begin{aligned} & \sin ^{-1} \frac{2 a}{1+a^{2}}-\cos ^{-1} \frac{1-b^{2}}{1+b^{2}}=2 \tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow & 2 \tan ^{-1} a-2 \tan ^{-1} b=2 \tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} x=\tan ^{-1} \frac{a-b}{1+a b} \Rightarrow x=\frac{a-b}{1+a b}\end{aligned} ⇒⇒sin−11+a22a−cos−11+b21−b2=2tan−1x2tan−1a−2tan−1b=2tan−1xtan−1x=tan−11+aba−b⇒x=1+aba−b
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $sin⁡−12a1+a2−cos⁡−11−b21+b2=2tan⁡−1x⇒2tan⁡−1a−2tan⁡−1b=2tan⁡−1x⇒tan⁡−1x=tan⁡−1a−b1+ab⇒x=a−b1+ab \begin{aligned} & \sin ^{-1} \frac{2 a}{1+a^{2}}-\cos ^{-1} \frac{1-b^{2}}{1+b^{2}}=2 \tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow & 2 \tan ^{-1} a-2 \tan ^{-1} b=2 \tan ^{-1} x \\ \Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} x=\tan ^{-1} \frac{a-b}{1+a b} \Rightarrow x=\frac{a-b}{1+a b}\end{aligned} ⇒⇒sin−11+a22a−cos−11+b21−b2=2tan−1x2tan−1a−2tan−1b=2tan−1xtan−1x=tan−11+aba−b⇒x=1+aba−b$

question: tan⁡−1x+tan⁡−1y+tan⁡−1z=π \tan ^{-1} x+\tan ^{-1} y+\tan ^{-1} z=\pi tan−1x+tan−1y+tan−1z=π হলে x+y+z x+y+z x+y+z এর মান কত ?

options.d: 𝑧 2 𝑦 2 𝑥 2 z 2 y 2 x 2

explanation: Solve: দেওয়া আছে, tan⁡−1x+tan⁡−1y+tan⁡−1z=π⇒tan⁡−1x+y1−xy=π−tan⁡−1z⇒x+y1−xy=tan⁡(π−tan⁡−1z)=−tan⁡(tan⁡−1z)=−z⇒x+y=−z+xyz∴x+y+z=xyz \begin{aligned}& \tan ^{-1} x+\tan ^{-1} y+\tan ^{-1} z=\pi \\\Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} \frac{x+y}{1-x y}=\pi-\tan ^{-1} z \\\Rightarrow & \frac{x+y}{1-x y}=\tan \left(\pi-\tan ^{-1} z\right) \\& =-\tan \left(\tan ^{-1} z\right)=-z \\\Rightarrow & x+y=-z+x y z \\\therefore & x+y+z=x y z \text { }\end{aligned}⇒⇒⇒∴tan−1x+tan−1y+tan−1z=πtan−11−xyx+y=π−tan−1z1−xyx+y=tan(π−tan−1z)=−tan(tan−1z)=−zx+y=−z+xyzx+y+z=xyz
subject: Math
questionLatex: $tan⁡−1x+tan⁡−1y+tan⁡−1z=\\pi  \tan ^{-1} x+\tan ^{-1} y+\tan ^{-1} z=\pi tan−1x+tan−1y+tan−1z=\\pi  হলে x+y+z x+y+z x+y+z এর মান কত ?$
explanationLatex: $Solve: দেওয়া আছে, tan⁡−1x+tan⁡−1y+tan⁡−1z=\\pi ⇒tan⁡−1x+y1−xy=\\pi −tan⁡−1z⇒x+y1−xy=tan⁡(\\pi −tan⁡−1z)=−tan⁡(tan⁡−1z)=−z⇒x+y=−z+xyz∴x+y+z=xyz \begin{aligned}& \tan ^{-1} x+\tan ^{-1} y+\tan ^{-1} z=\pi \\\Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} \frac{x+y}{1-x y}=\pi-\tan ^{-1} z \\\Rightarrow & \frac{x+y}{1-x y}=\tan \left(\pi-\tan ^{-1} z\right) \\& =-\tan \left(\tan ^{-1} z\right)=-z \\\Rightarrow & x+y=-z+x y z \\\therefore & x+y+z=x y z \text { }\end{aligned}⇒⇒⇒∴tan−1x+tan−1y+tan−1z=\\pi tan−11−xyx+y=\\pi −tan−1z1−xyx+y=tan(\\pi −tan−1z)=−tan(tan−1z)=−zx+y=−z+xyzx+y+z=xyz$

question: sin⁡−1(25)+tan⁡−1x=π2\sin^{- 1}{\left ( \frac{2}{\sqrt{5}} \right )} + \tan^{- 1}{x} = \frac{\pi}{2}sin−1(52)+tan−1x=2π হলে x এর মান-
explanation: sin⁡−1(25)+tan⁡−1x=π2⇒tan⁡−1x=π2−sin⁡−1(25)⇒x=tan⁡(π2−sin⁡−1(25))⇒x=cot⁡(sin⁡−1(25))⇒x=cot⁡(cot⁡−112)∴x=12 \begin{aligned} & \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)+\tan ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2}-\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\cot \left(\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\cot \left(\cot ^{-1} \frac{1}{2}\right) \\ \therefore & x=\frac{1}{2}\end{aligned} ⇒⇒⇒⇒∴sin−1(52)+tan−1x=2πtan−1x=2π−sin−1(52)x=tan(2π−sin−1(52))x=cot(sin−1(52))x=cot(cot−121)x=21
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $sin⁡−1(25)+tan⁡−1x=\\pi 2⇒tan⁡−1x=\\pi 2−sin⁡−1(25)⇒x=tan⁡(\\pi 2−sin⁡−1(25))⇒x=cot⁡(sin⁡−1(25))⇒x=cot⁡(cot⁡−112)∴x=12 \begin{aligned} & \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)+\tan ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \Rightarrow & \tan ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2}-\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\cot \left(\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)\right) \\ \Rightarrow & x=\cot \left(\cot ^{-1} \frac{1}{2}\right) \\ \therefore & x=\frac{1}{2}\end{aligned} ⇒⇒⇒⇒∴sin−1(52)+tan−1x=2\\pi tan−1x=2\\pi −sin−1(52)x=tan(2\\pi −sin−1(52))x=cot(sin−1(52))x=cot(cot−121)x=21$

question: sinθ+cosθ=√2 হলে, θ=?
explanation: sinθ + cosθ = 2 ⇒ 12cosθ + 12 sinθ =1⇒ cosθcosπ4 + sinθsinπ4 =1⇒cos(θ - π4) = 1 ⇒ θ - π4 =2nπ ⇒θ=2nπ + π4
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $sin\\theta  + cos\\theta  = 2 ⇒ 12cos\\theta  + 12 sin\\theta  =1⇒ cos\\theta cos\\pi 4 + sin\\theta sin\\pi 4 =1⇒cos(\\theta  - \\pi 4) = 1 ⇒ \\theta  - \\pi 4 =2n\\pi  ⇒\\theta =2n\\pi  + \\pi 4$

question: cot⁡−1(tan⁡2x)+cot⁡−1(−tan⁡3x)=? \cot ^{-1}(\tan 2 x)+\cot ^{-1}(-\tan 3 x)=? cot−1(tan2x)+cot−1(−tan3x)=?
explanation: Solve: cot⁡−1(tan⁡2x)+cot⁡−1(−tan⁡3x)=cot⁡−1(tan⁡2x)−cot⁡−1(tan⁡3x)=cot⁡−1{cot⁡(π2−2x)}−cot⁡−1{cot⁡(π2−3x)}=π2−2x−π2+3x=x\begin{array}{l}\cot ^{-1}(\tan 2 x)+\cot ^{-1}(-\tan 3 x) \\=\cot ^{-1}(\tan 2 x)-\cot ^{-1}(\tan 3 x) \\=\cot ^{-1}\left\{\cot \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-2x\right)\right\}-\cot ^{-1}\left\{\cot \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-3 x\right)\right\} \\=\frac{\pi}{2}-2 x-\frac{\pi}{2}+3 x=x\end{array}cot−1(tan2x)+cot−1(−tan3x)=cot−1(tan2x)−cot−1(tan3x)=cot−1{cot(2π−2x)}−cot−1{cot(2π−3x)}=2π−2x−2π+3x=x
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $Solve: cot⁡−1(tan⁡2x)+cot⁡−1(−tan⁡3x)=cot⁡−1(tan⁡2x)−cot⁡−1(tan⁡3x)=cot⁡−1{cot⁡(\\pi 2−2x)}−cot⁡−1{cot⁡(\\pi 2−3x)}=\\pi 2−2x−\\pi 2+3x=x\begin{array}{l}\cot ^{-1}(\tan 2 x)+\cot ^{-1}(-\tan 3 x) \\=\cot ^{-1}(\tan 2 x)-\cot ^{-1}(\tan 3 x) \\=\cot ^{-1}\left\{\cot \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-2x\right)\right\}-\cot ^{-1}\left\{\cot \left(\frac{\pi}{2}-3 x\right)\right\} \\=\frac{\pi}{2}-2 x-\frac{\pi}{2}+3 x=x\end{array}cot−1(tan2x)+cot−1(−tan3x)=cot−1(tan2x)−cot−1(tan3x)=cot−1{cot(2\\pi −2x)}−cot−1{cot(2\\pi −3x)}=2\\pi −2x−2\\pi +3x=x$

question: tanx tan3x=1tanx\ tan3x=1tanx tan3x=1 হলে x=?x=?x=?
explanation: tanx tan3x=1⇒sinx sin3xcosx cos3x=1⇒cosx cos3x−sinx sin3x=0⇒cos⁡(3x+x)=0 ; 4x=(2n+1)π2 x=(2n+1)π8tanx\ tan3x=1\\\Rightarrow\frac{sinx\ sin3x}{cosx\ cos3x}=1 \\\Rightarrow cosx\ cos3x-sinx\ sin3x=0 \\\Rightarrow\cos{\left(3x+x\right)}=0\ ;\ 4x=\left(2n+1\right)\frac{\pi}{2}\ \\\\x=\left(2n+1\right)\frac{\pi}{8}tanx tan3x=1⇒cosx cos3xsinx sin3x=1⇒cosx cos3x−sinx sin3x=0⇒cos(3x+x)=0 ; 4x=(2n+1)2π x=(2n+1)8π

question: Sin(π2cos⁡α)=cos⁡(π2sin⁡α)Sin{\left ( \frac{\pi}{2} \cos{\alpha} \right )} = \cos{\left ( \frac{\pi}{2} \sin{\alpha} \right )} Sin(2πcosα)=cos(2πsinα) হলে
explanation: α \alpha α এর মান কোনটি? sin⁡α=cos⁡β হলে α=π2±β∴α±β=π2α=0 হলে β=π2;β=0 হলে α=π2∴π2cos⁡α=0∴α=π2∴π2sin⁡α=0∴α=0∴ নির্নয় সমাধান (0,π2) \begin{array}{l}\sin \alpha=\cos \beta \text { হলে } \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \pm \beta \therefore \alpha \pm \beta=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \alpha=0 \text { হলে } \beta=\frac{\pi}{2} ; \beta=0 \text { হলে } \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \frac{\pi}{2} \cos \alpha=0 \therefore \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \frac{\pi}{2} \sin \alpha=0 \therefore \alpha=0 \\ \therefore \text { নির্নয় সমাধান }\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right)\end{array} sinα=cosβ হলে α=2π±β∴α±β=2πα=0 হলে β=2π;β=0 হলে α=2π∴2πcosα=0∴α=2π∴2πsinα=0∴α=0∴ নির্নয় সমাধান (0,2π)
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $α \alpha α এর মান কোনটি? sin⁡α=cos⁡β হলে α=\\pi 2\\pm β∴α\\pm β=\\pi 2α=0 হলে β=\\pi 2;β=0 হলে α=\\pi 2∴\\pi 2cos⁡α=0∴α=\\pi 2∴\\pi 2sin⁡α=0∴α=0∴ নির্নয় সমাধান (0,\\pi 2) \begin{array}{l}\sin \alpha=\cos \beta \text { হলে } \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \pm \beta \therefore \alpha \pm \beta=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \alpha=0 \text { হলে } \beta=\frac{\pi}{2} ; \beta=0 \text { হলে } \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \frac{\pi}{2} \cos \alpha=0 \therefore \alpha=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \therefore \frac{\pi}{2} \sin \alpha=0 \therefore \alpha=0 \\ \therefore \text { নির্নয় সমাধান }\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right)\end{array} sinα=cosβ হলে α=2\\pi \\pm β∴α\\pm β=2\\pi α=0 হলে β=2\\pi ;β=0 হলে α=2\\pi ∴2\\pi cosα=0∴α=2\\pi ∴2\\pi sinα=0∴α=0∴ নির্নয় সমাধান (0,2\\pi )$

question: tan⁡(cos⁡−1x)=sin⁡(tan⁡−12)\tan \left(\cos ^{-1} x\right)=\sin \left(\tan ^{-1} 2\right)tan(cos−1x)=sin(tan−12) তাহলে xxx এর মান নিচের কোনটি ?
explanation: Solve: tan⁡(cos⁡−1x)=sin⁡(tan⁡−12)⇒tan⁡(tan⁡−11−x2x)=sin⁡(sin⁡−1212+22)\begin{array}{l}\tan \left(\cos ^{-1} x\right)=\sin \left(\tan ^{-1} 2\right) \\\Rightarrow \tan \left(\tan ^{-1} \frac{\sqrt{1-x^{2}}}{x}\right)=\sin \left(\sin ^{-1} \frac{2}{\sqrt{1^{2}+2^{2}}}\right) \\\end{array}tan(cos−1x)=sin(tan−12)⇒tan(tan−1x1−x2)=sin(sin−112+222) ⇒1−x2x=25⇒1−x2x2=45⇒4x2=5−5x2⇒9x2=5∴x=±53\begin{array}{l}\Rightarrow \frac{\sqrt{1-x^{2}}}{x}=\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}} \Rightarrow \frac{1-x^{2}}{x^{2}}=\frac{4}{5} \\\Rightarrow 4 x^{2}=5-5 x^{2} \Rightarrow 9 x^{2}=5 \quad \therefore x= \pm \frac{\sqrt{5}}{3}\end{array}⇒x1−x2=52⇒x21−x2=54⇒4x2=5−5x2⇒9x2=5∴x=±35
subject: Math

question: (0<θ<π)
explanation: হলে θ এর মান হবে- cosec⁡θ+cot⁡θ=3 \operatorname{cosec} \theta+\cot \theta=\sqrt{3} cosecθ+cotθ=3 বা, 1sin⁡θ+cos⁡θsin⁡θ=3 \frac{1}{\sin \theta}+\frac{\cos \theta}{\sin \theta}=\sqrt{3} sinθ1+sinθcosθ=3 বা, 1+cos⁡θ=3sin⁡θ 1+\cos \theta=\sqrt{3} \sin \theta 1+cosθ=3sinθ বা, 3sin⁡θ−cos⁡θ=1 \sqrt{3} \sin \theta-\cos \theta=1 3sinθ−cosθ=1 বা32sin⁡θ−12cos⁡θ=12 বা \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sin \theta-\frac{1}{2} \cos \theta=\frac{1}{2} বা23sinθ−21cosθ=21 বা, sin⁡θcos⁡30∘−cos⁡θsin⁡30∘=1/2 \sin \theta \cos 30^{\circ}-\cos \theta \sin 30^{\circ}=1 / 2 sinθcos30∘−cosθsin30∘=1/2 বা. sin⁡(θ−30∘)=1/2 \sin \left(\theta-30^{\circ}\right)=1 / 2 sin(θ−30∘)=1/2 বা,sec⁡θ−30∘=30∘ বা ,\sec \theta-30^{\circ}=30^{\circ} বা,secθ−30∘=30∘ বা, θ=60∘=π/3 \theta=60^{\circ}=\pi / 3 θ=60∘=π/3
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $হলে \\theta  এর মান হবে- cosec⁡\\theta +cot⁡\\theta =3 \operatorname{cosec} \theta+\cot \theta=\sqrt{3} cosec\\theta +cot\\theta =3 বা, 1sin⁡\\theta +cos⁡\\theta sin⁡\\theta =3 \frac{1}{\sin \theta}+\frac{\cos \theta}{\sin \theta}=\sqrt{3} sin\\theta 1+sin\\theta cos\\theta =3 বা, 1+cos⁡\\theta =3sin⁡\\theta  1+\cos \theta=\sqrt{3} \sin \theta 1+cos\\theta =3sin\\theta  বা, 3sin⁡\\theta −cos⁡\\theta =1 \sqrt{3} \sin \theta-\cos \theta=1 3sin\\theta −cos\\theta =1 বা32sin⁡\\theta −12cos⁡\\theta =12 বা \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \sin \theta-\frac{1}{2} \cos \theta=\frac{1}{2} বা23sin\\theta −21cos\\theta =21 বা, sin⁡\\theta cos⁡30∘−cos⁡\\theta sin⁡30∘=\frac{1}{2} \sin \theta \cos 30^{\circ}-\cos \theta \sin 30^{\circ}=\frac{1}{2} sin\\theta cos30∘−cos\\theta sin30∘=\frac{1}{2} বা. sin⁡(\\theta −30∘)=\frac{1}{2} \sin \left(\theta-30^{\circ}\right)=\frac{1}{2} sin(\\theta −30∘)=\frac{1}{2} বা,sec⁡\\theta −30∘=30∘ বা ,\sec \theta-30^{\circ}=30^{\circ} বা,sec\\theta −30∘=30∘ বা, \\theta =60∘=\\\frac{pi}{3} \theta=60^{\circ}=\\frac{pi}{3} \\theta =60∘=\\\frac{pi}{3}$

question: tan⁡2θ + cot⁡2θ =2\tan^2\theta\ +\ \cot^2\theta\ =2tan2θ + cot2θ =2 এর সমাধান হবে -
explanation: Consider the given equation. tan⁡2θ+cot⁡2θ=2tan⁡2θ+1tan⁡2θ=2tan⁡4θ+1=2tan⁡2θtan⁡4θ−2tan⁡2θ+1=0(tan⁡2θ−1)2=0tan⁡2θ−1=0tan⁡2θ=1tan⁡2θ=tan⁡2π4θ=nπ±π4 \begin{array}{l} \tan ^{2} \theta+\cot ^{2} \theta=2 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta+\frac{1}{\tan ^{2} \theta}=2 \\ \tan ^{4} \theta+1=2 \tan ^{2} \theta \\ \tan ^{4} \theta-2 \tan ^{2} \theta+1=0 \\ \left(\tan ^{2} \theta-1\right)^{2}=0 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta-1=0 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta=1 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta=\tan ^{2} \frac{\pi}{4} \\ \theta=n \pi \pm \frac{\pi}{4} \end{array} tan2θ+cot2θ=2tan2θ+tan2θ1=2tan4θ+1=2tan2θtan4θ−2tan2θ+1=0(tan2θ−1)2=0tan2θ−1=0tan2θ=1tan2θ=tan24πθ=nπ±4π Hence, this is the answer.
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $Consider the given equation. tan⁡2\\theta +cot⁡2\\theta =2tan⁡2\\theta +1tan⁡2\\theta =2tan⁡4\\theta +1=2tan⁡2\\theta tan⁡4\\theta −2tan⁡2\\theta +1=0(tan⁡2\\theta −1)2=0tan⁡2\\theta −1=0tan⁡2\\theta =1tan⁡2\\theta =tan⁡2\\pi 4\\theta =n\\pi \\pm \\pi 4 \begin{array}{l} \tan ^{2} \theta+\cot ^{2} \theta=2 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta+\frac{1}{\tan ^{2} \theta}=2 \\ \tan ^{4} \theta+1=2 \tan ^{2} \theta \\ \tan ^{4} \theta-2 \tan ^{2} \theta+1=0 \\ \left(\tan ^{2} \theta-1\right)^{2}=0 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta-1=0 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta=1 \\ \tan ^{2} \theta=\tan ^{2} \frac{\pi}{4} \\ \theta=n \pi \pm \frac{\pi}{4} \end{array} tan2\\theta +cot2\\theta =2tan2\\theta +tan2\\theta 1=2tan4\\theta +1=2tan2\\theta tan4\\theta −2tan2\\theta +1=0(tan2\\theta −1)2=0tan2\\theta −1=0tan2\\theta =1tan2\\theta =tan24\\pi \\theta =n\\pi \\pm 4\\pi  Hence, this is the answer.$

question: f:R→R, f : R \rightarrow R , f:R→R, যেখানে f(x)=x2−2∣x∣ f \left(\right. x \left.\right) = x^{2} - 2 \left|\right. x \left|\right. f(x)=x2−2∣x∣ এবং g:R→R, g : R \rightarrow R , g:R→R, যেখানে g(x)=x2+1;"(gof)(−4)" g \left(\right. x \left.\right) = x^{2} + 1 ; " \left(\right. g o f \left.\right) \left(\right. - 4 \left.\right) " g(x)=x2+1;"(gof)(−4)" এর মান কত?

question: tan⁡(π4+12cos⁡−1ab)+tan⁡(π4−12cos⁡−1ab)=? \tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right)+ \tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right) = ?tan(4π+21cos−1ba)+tan(4π−21cos−1ba)=?
explanation: Solve : মনে করি, cos⁡−1ab=x⇒ab=cos⁡x \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}=x \Rightarrow \frac{a}{b}=\cos x cos−1ba=x⇒ba=cosx tan⁡(π4+12cos⁡−1ab)+tan⁡(π4−12cos⁡−1ab)=tan⁡(π4+x2)+tan⁡(π4−x2)=sin⁡(π4+x2)cos⁡(π4+x2)+sin⁡(π4−x2)cos⁡(π4−x2)=sin⁡(π4+x2)cos⁡(π4−x2)+sin⁡(π4−x2)cos⁡(π4+x2)cos⁡(π4+x2)cos⁡(π4−x2)=2sin⁡(π4+x2+π4−x2)2cos⁡(π4+x2)cos⁡(π4−x2)=2sin⁡2⋅π4cos⁡2⋅π4+cos⁡2⋅x2=2sin⁡π2cos⁡π2+cos⁡x=20+ab=2ba\begin{array}{l}\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right)+\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right) \\=\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)+\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right) \\=\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}+\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)+\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{2 \sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}+\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)}{2 \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{2 \sin 2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4}}{\cos 2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4}+\cos 2 \cdot \frac{x}{2}} \\=\frac{2 \sin \frac{\pi}{2}}{\cos \frac{\pi}{2}+\cos x} \\ =\frac{2}{0+\frac{a}{b}} \\ =\frac{2 b}{a}\end{array}tan(4π+21cos−1ba)+tan(4π−21cos−1ba)=tan(4π+2x)+tan(4π−2x)=cos(4π+2x)sin(4π+2x)+cos(4π−2x)sin(4π−2x)=cos(4π+2x)cos(4π−2x)sin(4π+2x)cos(4π−2x)+sin(4π−2x)cos(4π+2x)=2cos(4π+2x)cos(4π−2x)2sin(4π+2x+4π−2x)=cos2⋅4π+cos2⋅2x2sin2⋅4π=cos2π+cosx2sin2π=0+ba2=a2b
subject: Math
explanationLatex: $Solve : মনে করি, cos⁡−1ab=x⇒ab=cos⁡x \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}=x \Rightarrow \frac{a}{b}=\cos x cos−1ba=x⇒ba=cosx tan⁡(\\pi 4+12cos⁡−1ab)+tan⁡(\\pi 4−12cos⁡−1ab)=tan⁡(\\pi 4+x2)+tan⁡(\\pi 4−x2)=sin⁡(\\pi 4+x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4+x2)+sin⁡(\\pi 4−x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4−x2)=sin⁡(\\pi 4+x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4−x2)+sin⁡(\\pi 4−x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4+x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4+x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4−x2)=2sin⁡(\\pi 4+x2+\\pi 4−x2)2cos⁡(\\pi 4+x2)cos⁡(\\pi 4−x2)=2sin⁡2⋅\\pi 4cos⁡2⋅\\pi 4+cos⁡2⋅x2=2sin⁡\\pi 2cos⁡\\pi 2+cos⁡x=20+ab=2ba\begin{array}{l}\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right)+\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{1}{2} \cos ^{-1} \frac{a}{b}\right) \\=\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)+\tan \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right) \\=\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}+\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)+\sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right)}{\cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{2 \sin \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}+\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)}{2 \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}+\frac{x}{2}\right) \cos \left(\frac{\pi}{4}-\frac{x}{2}\right)} \\=\frac{2 \sin 2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4}}{\cos 2 \cdot \frac{\pi}{4}+\cos 2 \cdot \frac{x}{2}} \\=\frac{2 \sin \frac{\pi}{2}}{\cos \frac{\pi}{2}+\cos x} \\ =\frac{2}{0+\frac{a}{b}} \\ =\frac{2 b}{a}\end{array}tan(4\\pi +21cos−1ba)+tan(4\\pi −21cos−1ba)=tan(4\\pi +2x)+tan(4\\pi −2x)=cos(4\\pi +2x)sin(4\\pi +2x)+cos(4\\pi −2x)sin(4\\pi −2x)=cos(4\\pi +2x)cos(4\\pi −2x)sin(4\\pi +2x)cos(4\\pi −2x)+sin(4\\pi −2x)cos(4\\pi +2x)=2cos(4\\pi +2x)cos(4\\pi −2x)2sin(4\\pi +2x+4\\pi −2x)=cos2⋅4\\pi +cos2⋅2x2sin2⋅4\\pi =cos2\\pi +cosx2sin2\\pi =0+ba2=a2b$

question: cos-1x + cos-1y = π/2 হলে x2+y2 এর মান কত?
explanation: cos⁡−1x+cos⁡−1y=π2⇒cos⁡−1x=π2−cos⁡−1y⇒cos⁡−1x=sin⁡−1y[∵sin⁡−1y+cos⁡−1y=π2]⇒cos⁡−1x=cos⁡−11−y2x=1−y2⇒x2+y2=1 (Ans) \begin{array}{l}\cos ^{-1} x+\cos ^{-1} y=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2}-\cos ^{-1} y \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\sin ^{-1} y\left[\because \sin ^{-1} y+\cos ^{-1} y=\frac{\pi}{2}\right] \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\cos ^{-1} \sqrt{1-y^{2}} \\ x=\sqrt{1-y^{2}} \Rightarrow x^{2}+y^{2}=1 \quad \text { (Ans) }\end{array} cos−1x+cos−1y=2π⇒cos−1x=2π−cos−1y⇒cos−1x=sin−1y[∵sin−1y+cos−1y=2π]⇒cos−1x=cos−11−y2x=1−y2⇒x2+y2=1 (Ans)
subject: Math
questionLatex: $cos-1x + cos-1y = \\\frac{pi}{2} হলে x2+y2 এর মান কত?$
explanationLatex: $cos⁡−1x+cos⁡−1y=\\pi 2⇒cos⁡−1x=\\pi 2−cos⁡−1y⇒cos⁡−1x=sin⁡−1y[∵sin⁡−1y+cos⁡−1y=\\pi 2]⇒cos⁡−1x=cos⁡−11−y2x=1−y2⇒x2+y2=1 (Ans) \begin{array}{l}\cos ^{-1} x+\cos ^{-1} y=\frac{\pi}{2} \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\frac{\pi}{2}-\cos ^{-1} y \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\sin ^{-1} y\left[\because \sin ^{-1} y+\cos ^{-1} y=\frac{\pi}{2}\right] \\ \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1} x=\cos ^{-1} \sqrt{1-y^{2}} \\ x=\sqrt{1-y^{2}} \Rightarrow x^{2}+y^{2}=1 \quad \text { (Ans) }\end{array} cos−1x+cos−1y=2\\pi ⇒cos−1x=2\\pi −cos−1y⇒cos−1x=sin−1y[∵sin−1y+cos−1y=2\\pi ]⇒cos−1x=cos−11−y2x=1−y2⇒x2+y2=1 (Ans)$
